message: Unhandled exception. System.Collections.Generic.KeyNotFoundException: The given key 'JPY' was not present in the dictionary.

expected_root_cause:
The CartCalculator.CalculateTotal() method attempts to look up the requested currency in the ConversionRates dictionary at line 33.
 The dictionary only contains USD and EUR. When a checkout request with currency 'JPY' is processed, a KeyNotFoundException is thrown because JPY does not exist in the dictionary.
expected_fix_suggestion_mentions: Add or validate JPY support in cart pricing/conversion logic
Prevent KeyNotFoundException in total calculation path
